bugs.report_text: The control buttons are stacking vertically in a column instead of displaying horizontally in a row.

bugs.report_text: The play button is excessively large, consuming most of the viewport and breaking the layout.

bugs.report_text: The header is hidden behind other page content when scrolling, making it inaccessible.

bugs.pos_code: <header className="border-b border-gray-800 bg-gray-900/50 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-0">

bugs.report_text: The app logo text is rendered in plain white instead of displaying the intended gradient color effect.

bugs.report_text: The album artwork is offset from its intended position and overlaps the surrounding UI elements.
The LIVE indicator badge stretches to cover the entire album artwork instead of appearing as a small badge.

bugs.report_text: The episode list button has excessive internal spacing, creating an unnaturally oversized and awkward appearance.

bugs.report_text: The secondary control sliders are arranged in two columns instead of three, causing misalignment and poor visual balance.
The stats card labels are rendered in a near-black color and are nearly invisible against the dark background.
